office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: Incumbent Travis Couture faces public-service professional Maria Littlesun; their documented priorities differ on fiscal restraint and public investment.

candidates.summary: Littlesun is a public-service professional emphasizing affordability, housing, schools, and health-care access.
highlights: Emphasizes affordability and expanded housing options [S2]
Supports stronger public schools and wider health-care access [S2]

spending.basis: She emphasizes stronger public schools and wider health-care access as public priorities.

experience.basis: She brings public-service experience but has no documented elected record.

candidates.summary: Couture is an incumbent representative and House Republican budget leader emphasizing tax and spending restraint and government accountability.
highlights: Opposes the 2026 income tax and supports tax restraint [S2]
Supports spending restraint and government accountability [S2][S3]

taxes.basis: He explicitly opposes the 2026 income tax and supports tax restraint.

spending.basis: He explicitly argues for spending restraint and government accountability.

experience.basis: He is an incumbent representative and House Republican budget leader.
